testsuite.name: com.carbooking.gui.tests.SecurityTests

testcase.name: findIdorThreat

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: УГРОЗА УТЕЧКИ: Персональные данные других пользователей доступны через манипуляцию ID в URL! expected [true] but found [false]

lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 146.0.7680.80. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.31.0` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
